description: This email template is designed for non-profit organizations looking to raise awareness and funds for World Water Day. It features a dark mode design, making it easy on the eyes while highlighting the urgency of the cause. The template offers a perfect platform to share blog posts or newsletters about climate change, global warming, and pollution, emphasizing their impact on earth's oceans. It also encourages activism by providing spaces to share volunteer opportunities and ways to contribute towards the cause. With its focus on global observances and celebrations, this template serves as a powerful tactic to rally support for World Water Day and other environmental initiatives.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
